inputs.label: Applied Stress
inputs.businessContext: The sustained mechanical stress acting on the material, in megapascals.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Absolute operating temperature of the component in Kelvin.

inputs.label: Material Constant A
inputs.businessContext: Pre‑exponential factor, a material‑dependent strength parameter (units: MPa⁻ⁿ s⁻¹).

inputs.label: Stress Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless exponent describing the stress sensitivity of the creep rate (typically 3–8 for metals).

inputs.label: Activation Energy
inputs.businessContext: Activation energy for creep deformation, material property in joules per mole.

inputs.label: Gas Constant
inputs.businessContext: Universal gas constant; may be adjusted for different unit systems.
